title: Additionality
description: A Mod which adds all sorts of QoL enhancements
body:
# Description:

### A Mod which aims to add functionalities which enhance the gameplay. Be it QoL or interesting mechanics.  
### Suggestions are always open, be it on GitHub or in the comment section.  
Artist needed! 

# Features:

*   Adds a Portable Jukebox including:
    *   disc storage to create a library of music discs to play anywhere you go (see screenshots). Made for adventuring!
    *   compatibility with modded music discs (e.g. Too Many Discs!)
*   More to come!

# Currently working on:

*   Curios functionality for the Portable Jukebox
*   Custom Effect Beacon (OmniBeacon? Name is a Work-In-Progress)
